name: Interpretation Forecast review for Autophagy Induction bundle
summary: Interpretation and forecast framing pass for revision 1. The staged outlook keeps Autophagy Induction at low-confidence human_biomarker_signal with mixed momentum, adds no-results registry context as watchlist/source-completeness evidence, and preserves the requirement for repeated durable human functional, disease, or mortality-relevant outcomes before any rating upgrade.

findings.claim_or_issue: The added trial registry records increase visibility of field activity but do not provide posted efficacy or safety results.
findings.why_it_matters: Without this distinction, active or completed trials could be misread as progress toward durable LEV-relevant benefit.
findings.recommended_action: No revision required. The staged wording repeatedly labels these records as no-results registry context and keeps the stage, momentum, and confidence unchanged.
